title: VimFu — Recipe: Delete All Comments
description: Use :g/^#/d to delete all comment lines in a file. Works for any comment style by changing the pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo Python file with comments

setup.content:
# Server settings
host = "localhost"
port = 8080
# Database config
db_name = "myapp"
# Enable debug mode
debug = True
# Timeout value
timeout = 30
user = "admin"

steps.say: This Python file has comment lines scattered throughout. Let's strip them all at once.
The global command finds every line starting with hash and deletes it.
Four comment lines removed. Only the actual code remains.
For C-style double-slash comments, change the pattern to slash slash. Same idea, different pattern.
Colon g pattern d. Global delete on any pattern. Comments, blank lines, anything.
